request.description: These `params` control how the **Sales Navigator Leads Scraper** behaves — including pagination, result limits, and optional email enrichment. ➡️ These parameters are specific to the **Sales Navigator Leads Scraper**. _Refer to the_ [Constructing the params Object](#1cae1d9a-b706-4ec4-8414-b067c60cc8d7) _section to understand how to format and apply them._ | Parameter | Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | **functions.email** | boolean | If `true`, finds emails using Lobstr.io's enrichment service (incurs extra credits). | | **profiles_per_page** | integer | Number of leads to scrape per page. Allowed max: 25. | | **max_pages** | integer | Maximum number of pages to crawl. Allowed max: 100. | | **max_results** | integer or null | Total number of leads to collect before stopping. `null` means no limit. |

response.name: Example

request.description:
These `result` objects are returned by the **Sales Navigator Leads Scraper**.

| **Field** | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **api_urn** | string | The LinkedIn API URN identifying this lead record. |
| **first_name** / **last_name** | string | Lead’s given name and family name. |
| **full_name** | string | Lead’s full name. |
| **headline** | string | Lead’s current LinkedIn headline (job title + company). |
| **position** | string | Lead’s current position title. |
| **company_name** | string | Name of the company where the lead works. |
| **company_id** | integer | Internal LinkedIn company ID. |
| **company_linkedin_url** | string (URL) | URL of the company’s LinkedIn page. |
| **company_description** | string | Text description of the company. |
| **company_domain** | string | Company website domain (if available). |
| **company_employee_count_range** | string | Range label for company size (e.g., “51-200”). |
| **company_revenue_range** | string | Revenue bracket label (e.g., “10.0 mil USD – 20.0 mil USD”). |
| **company_created_at** | string (ISO) | When the company was first scraped. |
| **company_updated_at** | string (ISO) | When the company data was last refreshed. |
| **location** | string | Lead’s location string (city, state, country). |
| **connections** | integer | Number of 1st-degree connections the lead has. |
| **current_job_numbers** | integer | Number of concurrent positions held by the lead. |
| **seniority** | string | Lead’s seniority level (e.g., “Vice President”). |
| **started_on** | string (ISO) | When the lead started their current position. |
| **months_in_position** | integer | Tenure in current role (in months). |
| **years_in_position** | integer | Tenure in current role (in years). |
| **email** | string or null | Lead’s email address (if `functions.email = true` and enrichment succeeded). |
| **functions.email.filling_date** | string | When the email enrichment was performed (`DD/MM/YYYY, HH:mm:ss Z`). |
| **linkedin_profile_url** | string (URL) | Direct URL to the lead’s public LinkedIn profile. |
| **sales_navigator_profile_url** | string (URL) | URL to the lead’s Sales Navigator profile page. |
| **company_profile_picture** | string (URL) | URL of the company’s LinkedIn logo image. |
| **industry** | string or null | Lead’s industry category. |
| **match_filters** | boolean | `true` if the lead matched your Sales Navigator filters exactly. |

response.name: Example
